creator: dsimader@sql-ledger.org
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	Makefile
#	distinfo
#	pkg-comment
#	pkg-descr
#	pkg-plist
#
echo x - Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >Makefile << 'END-of-Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:    sql-ledger
X# Date created:                         15 May 2001
X# Whom:                                 dsimader@sql-ledger.org
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	sql-ledger
XPORTVERSION=	1.6.4
XCATEGORIES=	deskutils
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.sql-ledger.org/source/
X
XMAINTAINER=	dsimader@sql-ledger.org
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=    ${LOCALBASE}/lib/perl5/site_perl/${PERL_VER}/${PERL_ARCH}/DBI.pm:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-DBI
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-Makefile
echo x - distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >distinfo << 'END-of-distinfo'
XMD5 (sql-ledger-1.6.4.tar.gz) = c3542a6ec8b364891cd52046ec662ced
END-of-distinfo
echo x - pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >pkg-comment << 'END-of-pkg-comment'
XA double entry accounting program written in perl
END-of-pkg-comment
echo x - pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >pkg-descr << 'END-of-pkg-descr'
XSQL-Ledger is a double entry accounting program written in perl
X
XIts features include:
X
X* General Ledger, AR, AP, Inventory
X* Customizable reports, invoices and forms
X* Multiuser, multicompany
X* Universal tax system, data driven
X* Separate front- and backend (perl modules)
X* Database independant interface to connect to SQL server
X
XWWW: http://www.sql-ledger.org/
END-of-pkg-descr
echo x - pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >pkg-plist << 'END-of-pkg-plist'
